section.div: Favorites genres: Drama, Slice of Life, Fantasy, Action, Comedy, Romance

div.div: The second season of Sousou no Frieren.

Hellsing follows the antiheroic vampire, Alucard, and a police girl-turned-vampire, Seras Victoria, two vampires employed by the vampire-extermination group of England, the Hellsing Organization. Slowly but surely, through their active duty, they find a new breed of vampires beginning to arise.
(Source: Anime News Network)

A young priestess joins her first adventuring party but almost immediately encounters the most unspeakable horrors. Rescued by an enigmatic warrior called Goblin Slayer, she partners with her savior on his mission to exterminate all goblins-by any means necessary. When rumors of Goblin Slayer's feats begin circulating, there's no telling who might come calling next...

(Source: Yen Press)
Comedy, Ecchi, Romance, Slice of Life

A young salaryman is struggling with his "life" of long hours and little pay. Everyday is a slog. But every Monday morning he runs into Ai. Ai's a cheerful high school student who used to suffer from low self-esteem. Now the two have things to look forward to each week, even if those moments only seem to last for a few stops.
(Source: Denpa Books)
